channel.title: Drone on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Drone on Nature Works

item.title: Mapping
item.description:
I bought a cheap drone for making garden plans, now I need to figure out how to create an orthomosaic map!

I bought a DJI Mini 2 SE drone to take photos of gardens, so that I can more easily create garden designs and planting plans. http://localhost:1313/blog/240213-mapping/

item.title: Drone
item.description:
The first test flight of the new drone! It didn’t crash.

I bought a drone for photos of garden plans. Originally I thought a drone would only be useful for large gardens but I really think it’ll be an invaluable way of documenting planting plans. http://localhost:1313/blog/240118-drone/
